title: poicilla oblongata
intro: Poicilla oblongata, also known as the Mexican tea tree or yellow pith bird lime tree, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Poicilla oblongata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
